---
title: "Puget Sound Vanpool and Transit Data"
format: dashboard
---

## Row {height="70%"}

```{r}
plot(cars)
```

## Row {height="30%"}

### Column {.tabset}

```{r}
#| title: Chart 2
hist(cars$speed)
```

```{r}
#| title: Chart 3
hist(cars$dist)
```

### Column

```{r}
#| title: Chart 4
plot(cars$speed, cars$dist)
```
